# Derb — Full Reference

> Complete content index for Derb (https://derb.so), an urban reference explaining Morocco's everyday realities.

## Guides

### The Medina
URL: https://derb.so/guides/the-medina
What a medina is, why GPS fails, why streets look sketchy, and how centuries-old infrastructure shapes daily life.

### Getting Around
URL: https://derb.so/guides/getting-around
Taxis, trains, buses, ride-hailing apps, plugs, and the tourist tax.

### Social & Cultural
URL: https://derb.so/guides/social-and-cultural
Tea, bargaining, dress codes, photography, time, cash, staring, and the social codes visitors encounter.

### Food & Drink
URL: https://derb.so/guides/food-and-drink
Tap water, shared tagines, hammams, mint tea, vegan food, alcohol, and stomach adjustment.

### Staying Safe
URL: https://derb.so/guides/staying-safe
Henna scams, fake guides, tourist police, horse carriages, LGBTQ+ safety, and navigating the medina at night.

### Religious Calendar
URL: https://derb.so/guides/religious-calendar
Ramadan, Eid al-Adha, public holidays, and how the religious calendar shapes daily life.

### The Cities
URL: https://derb.so/guides/the-cities
Marrakech mosques, Casablanca's Art Deco, Agadir's earthquake, Rabat as capital, and Taghazout's surf coast.

## Questions (57)

### Arrival & Logistics

- [Why can't my taxi take me to the door?](https://derb.so/questions/why-cant-taxi-take-me-to-the-door)
  Riads are nestled in car-free zones of the medina.
- [What is the tourist tax?](https://derb.so/questions/what-is-the-tourist-tax)
  A government levy (taxe de séjour) of approximately €2.50 per person per night.
- [Is there a ride-hailing app?](https://derb.so/questions/is-there-a-ride-hailing-app)
  inDrive is the most widely used. Uber relaunched in late 2025.
- [How do I get a petit taxi to use the meter?](https://derb.so/questions/how-do-i-get-a-petit-taxi-to-use-the-meter)
  Say compteur before the car moves.
- [What's the difference between petit and grand taxis?](https://derb.so/questions/whats-the-difference-between-petit-and-grand-taxis)
  Petit taxis are city-only and metered. Grand taxis are intercity and shared.
- [How do trains work?](https://derb.so/questions/how-do-trains-work)
  ONCF runs everything. Al Boraq is Africa's only high-speed rail.
- [How do buses work?](https://derb.so/questions/how-do-buses-work)
  Two names: Supratours and CTM.
- [What plugs do they use?](https://derb.so/questions/what-plugs-do-they-use)
  Type C and E — same as France.

### The Medina

- [What is a medina?](https://derb.so/questions/what-is-a-medina)
  The Arabic word for "city."
- [Why is my GPS wrong?](https://derb.so/questions/why-is-my-gps-wrong)
  High walls bounce GPS signals — errors of 10 to 30 metres.
- [What does "Balak!" mean?](https://derb.so/questions/what-does-balak-mean)
  Move aside.
- [Why does the bathroom smell?](https://derb.so/questions/why-does-the-bathroom-smell)
  Dry drain traps. Run the tap for ten seconds.
- [Why is the riad so hard to find?](https://derb.so/questions/why-is-the-riad-so-hard-to-find)
  The door is designed to blend into the wall.
- [Why is it so cold inside in winter?](https://derb.so/questions/why-is-it-so-cold-inside-in-winter)
  Thermal mass works both ways.
- [Why can you hear everything?](https://derb.so/questions/why-can-you-hear-everything)
  The courtyard is a vertical amphitheatre.
- [Why are the beds so hard?](https://derb.so/questions/why-are-the-beds-so-hard)
  That's how they're meant to feel in Morocco.
- [Why are there cockroaches in a clean riad?](https://derb.so/questions/why-are-there-cockroaches-in-a-clean-riad)
  Climate and infrastructure, not hygiene.
- [Why is it so loud at 4:30am?](https://derb.so/questions/why-is-it-so-loud-at-430am)
  The call to prayer (Fajr) from minarets.
- [What was the 2023 earthquake?](https://derb.so/questions/what-was-the-2023-earthquake)
  Magnitude 6.8, 8 September 2023.
- [Why are the walls stained or bubbling?](https://derb.so/questions/why-are-the-walls-stained-or-bubbling)
  Efflorescence — mineral salts pushed to the surface by moisture.
- [Why are the floors stained or uneven?](https://derb.so/questions/why-are-the-floors-stained-or-uneven)
  Handmade tiles are porous by nature.
- [Why does the wifi barely work?](https://derb.so/questions/why-does-the-wifi-barely-work)
  Thick walls block the signal.
- [Why does the electricity flicker?](https://derb.so/questions/why-does-the-electricity-flicker)
  Old wiring and shared circuits.
- [Why are there cats everywhere?](https://derb.so/questions/why-are-there-cats-everywhere)
  They're the city's pest control.

### Social & Cultural

- [Is it rude to refuse tea?](https://derb.so/questions/is-it-rude-to-refuse-tea)
  Tea is a social contract.
- [What should I wear?](https://derb.so/questions/what-should-i-wear)
  Shoulders and knees covered.
- [Can I photograph people?](https://derb.so/questions/can-i-photograph-people)
  Ask first.
- [Can you show affection in public?](https://derb.so/questions/can-you-show-affection-in-public)
  Kissing or heavy physical contact is culturally out of place and legally punishable.
- [Is Morocco safe for LGBTQ+ visitors?](https://derb.so/questions/is-morocco-safe-for-lgbtq-visitors)
  Same-sex sexual activity is illegal under Article 489 — 6 months to 3 years.
- [Should you remove shoes?](https://derb.so/questions/should-you-remove-shoes)
  In homes, riad living areas, and mosques — yes.
- [Why does time work differently here?](https://derb.so/questions/why-does-time-work-differently-here)
  Two systems running at once.
- [Why does everyone want cash?](https://derb.so/questions/why-does-everyone-want-cash)
  Card acceptance is patchy.
- [How does bargaining work?](https://derb.so/questions/how-does-bargaining-work)
  Expected in souks, not everywhere.
- [Why does everyone ask where I'm from?](https://derb.so/questions/why-does-everyone-ask-where-im-from)
  Conversational opener, not interrogation.
- [Why do people stare?](https://derb.so/questions/why-do-people-stare)
  Curiosity, not hostility.

### Food & Drink

- [Can I drink the tap water?](https://derb.so/questions/can-i-drink-the-tap-water)
  Safe but mineral-heavy.
- [How do you eat from a shared tagine?](https://derb.so/questions/how-do-you-eat-from-a-shared-tagine)
  Right hand, bread as utensil, eat from the section in front of you.
- [What's the difference between a local and a spa hammam?](https://derb.so/questions/whats-the-difference-between-a-local-and-a-spa-hammam)
  Local: 20 dirhams, communal. Spa: 400–800 dirhams, private.
- [Why does mint tea taste different here?](https://derb.so/questions/why-does-mint-tea-taste-different-here)
  It's not mint-flavoured tea.
- [Can you eat vegan?](https://derb.so/questions/can-you-eat-vegan)
  Easier than expected.
- [Can you drink alcohol?](https://derb.so/questions/can-you-drink-alcohol)
  Legal, available, but not everywhere.
- [Why is my stomach upset?](https://derb.so/questions/why-is-my-stomach-upset)
  Change in diet, not food poisoning.

### Safety

- [Why do the henna ladies grab your hand?](https://derb.so/questions/why-do-the-henna-ladies-grab-your-hand)
  The paste stains in seconds and can't be wiped off.
- [Are the monkeys in the square ethical?](https://derb.so/questions/are-the-monkeys-in-the-square-ethical)
  No.
- [Should I take a horse carriage?](https://derb.so/questions/should-i-take-a-horse-carriage)
  Look for the blue SPANA band on the horse's ankle.
- [What is the police touristique?](https://derb.so/questions/what-is-the-police-touristique)
  Morocco's dedicated tourist police unit.
- [How do I tell a real guide from a fake one?](https://derb.so/questions/how-do-i-tell-a-real-guide-from-a-fake-one)
  Official guides carry a large circular brass badge.
- [What do I do if I get lost at night?](https://derb.so/questions/what-do-i-do-if-i-get-lost-at-night)
  Head toward light.
- [Why do the streets look sketchy?](https://derb.so/questions/why-do-the-streets-look-sketchy)
  They're centuries old, not dangerous.

### Religious Calendar

- [What is Ramadan?](https://derb.so/questions/what-is-ramadan)
  The Islamic month of fasting from dawn to sunset.
- [What is Eid al-Adha?](https://derb.so/questions/what-is-eid-al-adha)
  Morocco's most important religious holiday.
- [When are public holidays?](https://derb.so/questions/when-are-public-holidays)
  11 fixed national holidays and 4 Islamic holidays that shift annually.

### Cities

- [Can you go inside the Koutoubia mosque?](https://derb.so/questions/can-you-go-inside-the-koutoubia-mosque)
  No.
- [Why does Agadir look nothing like other Moroccan cities?](https://derb.so/questions/why-does-agadir-look-nothing-like-other-moroccan-cities)
  An earthquake destroyed it in 1960.
- [Is Casablanca worth visiting?](https://derb.so/questions/is-casablanca-worth-visiting)
  The Hassan II Mosque and the Art Deco district.
- [Is Rabat the capital?](https://derb.so/questions/is-rabat-the-capital)
  Yes, since 1912.
- [Is Taghazout still a surf village?](https://derb.so/questions/is-taghazout-still-a-surf-village)
  The village and surf culture remain. The coastline south has transformed.
